equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.

equipmentMods.trinket: Kraken Seed: Kraken Seed shoots 3 tentacle dart, dealing 45% damage each.

equipmentMods.goblet: Fire Beam: Gain three additional beams.
Spark: Each spark propagates four additional times.
equipmentMods.horn: Kraken Seed: Running over a Kraken Seed will summon Dark Kraken tentacles that gains 100% bonus damage.
Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.
Lightning Totems: Totems range grows by 40%. Totems deal an additional 10% damage for every totem in its range.

equipmentMods.goblet: Fiery Totems: Walking over a Fiery Totem causes it to explode, setting off all other Fiery Totems. Totems that explode without dealing damage spawn an Ember Ghost that tracks enemies and deals 120% damage.
Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
Electric Dragons: For each dragon, all other dragons deals 95% increase damage.

equipmentMods.horn: Carnage of Fire: Impact spawns a scorching fire that lasts 2 seconds and dealing 150% damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Rain of Flames: Meteors now explode, gaining 85% more damage.

equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 40% increased damage. Chaos Orbs gain 15% increased damage for every additional orb. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
